dcterms:title: Basytec Battery Test System TXT/DAT — BDF column mapping
dcterms:description: Maps Basytec Battery Test System TXT and DAT export headers to BDF canonical columns. Headers are prefixed with '~' (stripped during parsing). Time may be exported in hours, minutes, or seconds; current may be in A, mA, or µA; voltage may be in V or mV. schema:unitCode documents the as-exported unit where conversion is required. File encoding is typically latin-1.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: test_time_second
csvw:columns.skos:note: Time[s] is already in seconds. Time[h] requires ×3600; Time[min] requires ×60. schema:unitCode is set per-file based on the actual header matched.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: voltage_volt
csvw:columns.skos:note: U[mV] variants require ÷1000. schema:unitCode is V for U[V] and mV for U[mV].

csvw:columns.csvw:name: current_ampere
csvw:columns.skos:note: I[mA] requires ÷1000; I[uA] requires ÷1000000. schema:unitCode is set per-file based on the actual header matched.
